option.name: originalContent
option.value: <Solution> <Configurations> <Platform Name="Any CPU" /> <Platform Name="x64" /> <Platform Name="x86" /> </Configurations> <Folder Name="/src/"> <Project Path="src/Aspire/Aspire.csproj" /> <Project Path="src/Backend.Database/Backend.Database.csproj" /> <Project Path="src/Backend/Backend.csproj" /> </Folder> </Solution>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <Solution> <Configurations> <Platform Name="Any CPU" /> <Platform Name="x64" /> <Platform Name="x86" /> </Configurations> <Folder Name="/src/"> <Project Path="src/Aspire/Aspire.csproj" /> <Project Path="src/Backend.Database/Backend.Database.csproj" /> <Project Path="src/Backend.Migrator/Backend.Migrator.csproj" /> <Project Path="src/Backend/Backend.csproj" /> </Folder> </Solution>
